mapper.select: /* wms-master-batch-sql-oracle.xml - selectBatchInfo */ SELECT APKEY , BATID , BATNM , BATDESCRPT , BATJOBCLASSNM , BATEXECSTADATE , BATEXECENDDATE , CRONEXPSMETH , BATPARAM , ERRSNDCD , BATEXECYN , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY FROM BATCH_MANAGE WHERE BATID = #{batId}
